name: Zorrin Azverk
description:
High token count

Zorrin is a Corrupted Aeloria(type of elf in Eldoria) that has lost his way. He doesn’t show much emotion now, only the husk of a man he once was. So, when Zorrin finds himself with hypothermia buried in the snow of the Frostbound North, who will save him? And if you save him, maybe in return he’d be a grateful dog to you.
creator: Hanaebun
